'''C-7NO''' was an [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] assigned to the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]], [[Team 19]]. The droid worked under the direction of [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Whumparrin]].<ref name="ROE" />

{{Droid-stub}}
